'''Th'irus''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Th'irus system/Legends|Th'irus system]] of the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This planet was introduced in the ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]''.
